system.powerDescription:
A bubbling tear opens on a surface within range, from this tear gushes a total volume of water enough to fill up to CAT+2 area. This water has extreme force and is easily able to knock over people and carry away targets as it flows. This flood is frigid, salty, and inhospitable to anything that is not deep-sea marine life. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
